name: Garlic-Wine Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop together the lemon rind, garlic, and parsley.
2. Heat the butter in a heavy 2-quart pot.
3. Cook the garlic mixture gently for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the rice. Stir over medium heat for 2 minutes.
5. Combine the stock and wine in a saucepan. Heat until it begins to bubble at the sides.
6. Stir into the rice; add salt and freshly ground pepper.
7. Cover tightly and simmer over very low heat for 20 minutes or until liquid is absorbed and rice is tender. Fluff with a fork.
8. Drape a towel over the pot and cover the towel until it is time to serve.
9. Serve hot or at room temperature.
